title: Do redheads get less time out of Botox treatments？
filename: Do redheads get less time out of Botox treatments？.en.vtt
excerpt: So do redhead patients get less time with toxin [Music] so this is a question an interesting question about whether there are genetic predispositions for getting less time with toxin and i imagine that there probably are there will be many genes involved in restoring the function…

segments.text: so do redhead patients get less time with toxin [Music] so this is a question an interesting question about whether there are genetic predispositions for getting less time with toxin and i imagine that there probably are there will be many genes involved in restoring the function of a nerve after toxins so it's regrowth and rebuilding receptors the rate of nerve generation all of those things maybe even muscle hypertrophy has genetic components that all contribute to the rate of achieving a full recovery after a relaxation of a muscle um whether that's involved with being a redhead or not i simply don't know it's not in my experience i haven't noticed that people with red hair get less time sounds like something you could do a little study on if you can get 30 or 40 minimum together you might be able to compare that and get a significant result if it's really obvious um i wouldn't suspect that it's that significant i know there's some

interesting genetic differences between those with red hen those not for example spicy food and sensitivity to pain may be different and that's that could be related but i wonder if the nerves are different i can't think of a reason why it would delay muscle activity sensation is a bit different but possibly um but it's not been my experience you

transcript: so do redhead patients get less time with toxin [Music] so this is a question an interesting question about whether there are genetic predispositions for getting less time with toxin and i imagine that there probably are there will be many genes involved in restoring the function of a nerve after toxins so it's regrowth and rebuilding receptors the rate of nerve generation all of those things maybe even muscle hypertrophy has genetic components that all contribute to the rate of achieving a full recovery after a relaxation of a muscle um whether that's involved with being a redhead or not i simply don't know it's not in my experience i haven't noticed that people with red hair get less time sounds like something you could do a little study on if you can get 30 or 40 minimum together you might be able to compare that and get a significant result if it's really obvious um i wouldn't suspect that it's that significant i know there's some interesting genetic differences between those with red hen those not for example spicy food and sensitivity to pain may be different and that's that could be related but i wonder if the nerves are different i can't think of a reason why it would delay muscle activity sensation is a bit different but possibly um but it's not been my experience you
